faq.question: How does the PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana subsidy work?
faq.answer: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana offers central financial assistance for eligible residential rooftop solar systems. Subsidy slabs depend on system size and sanctioned load. We help you understand the current scheme details and apply through the official portal where applicable.

faq.question: Will you help with net metering paperwork?
faq.answer: Yes, we guide you through the net metering process with the local DISCOM in Uttar Pradesh, including basic application support and documentation guidance.

faq.question: How long do solar panels typically last?
faq.answer: Most quality solar panels come with performance warranties of around 25 years. Panels can continue generating after that, with gradual reduction in output over time.

faq.question: Do solar panels work during monsoon and cloudy days?
faq.answer: Solar panels generate power from light, not heat. Output is lower on very cloudy or rainy days, but systems are designed considering annual sunshine so that overall yearly generation remains strong.

faq.question: What kind of maintenance do rooftop solar systems need?
faq.answer: Basic maintenance usually means periodic cleaning of the panels and occasional checks of wiring, mounting structures and inverter status. We can guide you on simple cleaning routines and service options.

faq.question: What affects the payback period for rooftop solar?
faq.answer: Payback depends on your electricity tariff, system size, consumption pattern, subsidy eligibility and financing, if any. We give an estimated payback range after reviewing your recent electricity bills.
